log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Owlin — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Owlin — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Owlin — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Owlin — Winged Striker HP: 55/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Owlin — Winged Striker HP: 33/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Owlin — Winged Striker --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Owlin — Winged Striker --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Owlin — Winged Striker HP: 22/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Owlin — Winged Striker HP: 5/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
